name: higgsfield
description: Higgsfield is an AI image & video generation platform exposing a Minimal Connector Protocol (MCP) server and CLI for programmatic agent integrations.

auth_methods.note: The CLI page explicitly states the CLI opens a browser to complete login and 'stores session tokens locally' for programmatic use. MCP docs also state authentication is via your Higgsfield account (no API keys), i.e., account web login + session tokens.

credential_access.note: Unable to fetch the pricing page content from this environment (Cloudflare/403), so I cannot verify whether developers can self-register, receive free trial credits, or otherwise obtain programmatic access without human approval. Treat as unclear.

api_surface.note: Unable to fetch the MCP documentation content from this environment (blocked), so I cannot quote/verify the precise interface description. Based on the disputed finding, the surface should be treated as a narrow MCP/HTTP-style interface rather than a broad public REST/GraphQL API; however confidence is low without retrievable primary text.

buildability.note: Unable to fetch/verify pricing and MCP docs due to access blocks from this environment. Buildability depends on whether account creation and credits are self-serve and immediately usable; without primary-source confirmation, verdict and blocker must remain unclear.

queries: Higgsfield API keys no api keys
